title: cacalia cinerea
intro: Cacalia cinerea, also known as Mountain Fleabane, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Cacalia cinerea include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as acting as an antiseptic to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
